site: Depot-exact material rebuild: Common
Depot-exact material rebuild: Granite_ResidentialNorth
Depot-exact material rebuild: Subsurface
Depot-exact material rebuild: Granite_TechCenter
Depot-exact material rebuild: FireStorm
Depot-exact material rebuild: Granite_MilitaryRnD
Depot-exact material rebuild: Granite_MilitaryStorage
Depot-exact material rebuild: Eastwood
Depot-exact material rebuild: Granite_Underground
Depot-exact material rebuild: Granite_Downtown
Global blueprint sweep: ~3,000 props across every map rebuilt from their game assembly data — every placeable with a blueprint now has an exact multi-part model
RefineryTower_01_B: full 60m composed tower baked from its Firestorm level placement (SDK-side composition, no game blueprint)
GMetroBus_01_AbbasidOpen: full texture rebuild via the new PhotoMatch loop (cairo livery, decals, two-tone paint)
GMetroBus refined: destruction-state filtering (no more broken-glass/burst-tire overlays), correct taillight colors, tinted glass, wheel sheet, calibrated paint tints
Finer scroll-wheel zoom in the viewer
The site version now tracks the released Godot plugin version
What's New restructured: per-day plugin release banner, plugin/site/model lanes, long model lists collapse
Scroll-wheel zoom rebuilt: travel is proportional to the wheel delta (smooth-scroll mice no longer leap) and zoom can never snap the camera
Phones: model cards no longer grab one-finger scrolling — the page scrolls normally; orbit starts once you tap a model open
Install guide rewritten for plugin v1.5 (background sync + download scope; no more manual res:// extraction or Medium tier)
Golmud Railway rescue: 188 props rebuilt from game blueprints (chemical plant, hesco towers, barracks, area complexes, supply packs, highway bridges) with region-correct Central Asia textures

plugin.notes: Background model sync, collision view, opening doors, real vehicles/soldiers on spawners

pluginNotes: Models sync in the background: registry diff on start + hourly, open-scene props download first, progress bar with pause — fixed models swap into your scene as they arrive
Model storage moved out of the project (user://): the editor no longer re-imports thousands of GLBs on launch; one-time guided migration for existing installs
Show collisions: draws each object's actual in-game collision (BF6 scales collision uniformly from the X axis) as a color/alpha-adjustable overlay, plus isolate-selection
Interactable doors swing open/closed on their real hinge with a left double-click
Gameplay spawners preview what they spawn: drivable vehicles with wheels/tracks/mounted guns, soldiers on SpawnPoint/AI Spawner, the Loot Spawner's weapon
Check for Updates button + download-scope switch (current scene only / all models) with clear confirmations; Purge button retired
Map data self-heals after game patches (per-session freshness check)
'Preview selected in High-Poly' checkbox replaces the selected-mode buttons; Map Context is now 'Show whole map'
Much lower texture memory (GPU-native compression at load) and no more per-draw tangent warnings

site: Full Siege of Cairo high-poly catalog published (238 new assembled models) plus 21 repaired roof/wall/interior pieces on other maps; wrong-model matches for unbuildable composites now fall back to the grey proxy.
Palm trees rebuilt with proper leaf transparency; hundreds of props gained their Portal names and map tags on the site.
Interactable doors rebuilt: intact leaf kept (world-space state filtering), wear masks no longer punch holes in wood; duplicate Portal-name cards removed.

entries.title: Abbasid overhaul + desktop inspector
site: Souk facade interior trim now uses its real authored tile sheet (found via the new material-family search)
New desktop viewer: Godot-style camera (RMB freelook + WASD fly, scroll adjusts speed)
Edit mode: inspect any surface, crop a wall region, realign/scale its texture live, swap sheets, and export fixes as JSON
Import fixes to preview community texture corrections on any model
Maximize button on the expanded viewer
Fixed assembled models not appearing under their map tab
Version history (this panel)
Fixed camera snapping to a stale orientation when scrolling after freelook
Custom texture upload: attach a reference image (e.g. an in-game screenshot) to a fix when no game sheet matches
Godot plugin v1.4.0: simplified detail modes (Low / High no-textures / High textured), Medium tier retired
entries.note: First wave of prefab-assembled models: composite objects (souk houses, wreck tanks, prop-dressed vehicles, the palace) are now built exactly as the game builds them, with real textures for interiors, vegetation and shared materials.
